caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie, and black headphones sits in a studio setting. He is positioned behind a desk with a professional microphone on a boom arm in front of him. His hoodie features the words "BOSS TALK" in gold and white lettering. To his right sits a blue and white container that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Behind him, a white banner displays a repeating logo with the words "UNION HUSTLE" and five gold stars. A blue sign on the wall reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". A small circular logo with a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK" is visible in the lower-left corner of the scene. Across the frames, the man remains stationary and maintains a neutral expression, looking slightly to his left. There is no discernible movement or change in the setting between the frames.
